batch_summary.note: Jan 2023: 1 primary RF-09 signal. S002 — DARVO-inversion gaslight accusation. Arc→WATCHING.

primary_flags.message_text: So nice try trying to gaslight and place blame
primary_flags.summary: Jan 2023: Melissa accuses Eli of gaslighting within a DARVO sequence. ROW-1715-1722 cluster context: Eli seeks clarification or sets a boundary; Melissa responds with DARVO pivot. ROW-1722: 'So nice try trying to gaslight and place blame' — DARVO inversion: Melissa names gaslighting and projects the accusation onto Eli. This is the first explicit gaslight-accusation in the record. Evidence Level E per ADD-001: reality-questioning language directed at Eli's perception without a specific denied claim and without a cross-referenceable contradiction. Arc transition: 2nd signal → ARC-RF09-001 CANDIDATE→WATCHING. ADD-004 applied: 2nd 'you're gaslighting' instance; arc escalation tracking. Compound per ADD-003: DARVO sequence (RF-04 primary ROW-1715-1789) includes explicit reality-questioning language against Eli → RF-09+RF-04 compound.
